title: Phase 2: scrapes:schedule command + ScrapeAirportSourceJob + scheduler registration
description: Implement the scheduler command that dispatches scrape jobs and the ScrapeAirportSourceJob that calls the scraper runtime via HTTP. Register scheduler in console.php.

title: Phase 2: Node.js scraper runtime HTTP server
description: Express HTTP server in /scraper-runtime that accepts POST /scrape requests, runs Playwright/fetch, returns normalized flight data.

title: Phase 2: scrapes:cleanup + repairs:recheck-open-failures commands
description: Implement maintenance commands: scrapes:cleanup (hourly artifact cleanup) and repairs:recheck-open-failures (every 5 min).

title: Commit all uncommitted Phase 1+2 work + implement scrapes:cleanup command
description: Uncommitted files: Domain models, controllers, migrations, Http resources. Implement scrapes:cleanup artisan command to purge expired artifacts.

title: Implement repairs:recheck-open-failures stub command + Phase 2 complete commit
description: Stub artisan command for Phase 5 failure recheck. Once done, Phase 2 can be marked complete.
